title: How Do Tool-Augmented LLM Agents Perform on Real-World Energy Analytics Tasks?
acquisition_purpose: Primary-source and official-release acquisition for queued review-energy-analytics-live-evidence-validity; this record does not claim a deep review.

paper.withdrawal_status: The immutable v1 API summary contains no withdrawal or retraction notice.
paper.extraction_status: The full immutable 22-page v1 PDF extracted successfully with no NUL or Unicode replacement characters. Title/abstract, benchmark construction, tool suite, evaluation protocol, results, limitations, references, appendix tables/prompts, and final physical page were sampled for continuity.

official_release.paper_link_evidence: The immutable paper links this repository in Section 4.3 and Appendix A.13; the queued review pins the exact commit for audit.
official_release.paper_release_timing: The pinned commit is 4 hours 30 minutes 40 seconds after immutable arXiv v1 publication. It is auditable release evidence but is not assumed to be the exact manuscript-time implementation without additional identity evidence.
official_release.license: MIT license file is present in the pinned archive.
official_release.release_inventory_check: The archive contains 74 Python files, a 188-row data/evals_tasks_only_188.csv file, 432 public trace JSON files, configuration, tool, sandbox, dependency, and runner code. README and the task CSV were opened successfully. No paid or live API calls were executed.
official_release.release_status: The exact queued commit was archived and integrity-checked. Its 188-row released task file differs from the paper abstract's 243-task corpus and Appendix A.13's statement that the repository contains 212 questions; resolving this discrepancy and auditing paper-to-release conformance remain review work.
official_release.correspondence_boundary: Acquisition verifies byte identity, archive readability, basic inventory, and the visible task-count discrepancy only. It does not validate task authority, live-source identity, tool behavior, graders, traces, results, reproducibility, or professional utility.

claim_boundary: This acquisition establishes local, hash-pinned paper and exact-release evidence only. It is not a deep review and does not validate expert curation, task representativeness, temporal semantics, source validity, quantitative references, judge calibration, configured-system comparability, uncertainty, cost, capability, professional validity, production fitness, safety, or readiness.
